en: And surely you will find them
So will suffice you against them
He will cause you to die
And surely We will test you
ms: dan sungguh akan Kami beri cobaan

en: He (would) have made it known to you
surely, He (would) have made them hear
so that they argue with you
you have been made to inherit it
you will (be able to) count them
And (prohibited are) the ones who are married
and We gave it to you to drink
ms: lalu Kami beri minum kamu dengannya

en: and those who seclude themselves for devotion and prayer
So he made both of them fall

ms: orang-orang yang istirahat ditengah siang hari

en: to those who often turn (to Him)
he could be granted a life
surely we would have stoned you
And surely We will make you dwell
ms: dan sungguh Kami akan menempatkan kamu

en: Have they transmitted it to them
the ones who put trust (in Him)
and so that they may commit
an evil suggestion comes to you
will be asked to make amends
the Sustainer of all that exists
you will be able to do justice
(even as much as) a hair on a date-seed
so that they may ruin them
should We compel you (to accept) it
And the women who are divorced
(even as much as the) speck on a date seed
surely He (would have) given them power
and surely arouse desires in them
ms: dan sungguh saya akan membangkitkan angan-angan kosong mereka
binatang yang diberi kalung untuk korban

en: Then has your Lord chosen (for) you
took upon himself a greater share of it

ms: dan yang datang di malam hari

en: And they were made to drink
surely He (could have) put you in difficulties
so they will surely cut off
and that which is strangled (to death)
and that which is hit fatally
and that which has a fatal fall
and that which is gored by horns
ones who train animals to hunt

ms: haam (unta larangan yang tidak boleh dibebani)

en: And he swore (to) both of them
and He made you (appear) as few
so He made them lag behind
And they ask you to inform
the one in whom hope was placed
will surely pay them in full
you think me weakened in mind
with this silver coin of yours

ms: dan hendaklah dia bersikap lemah lembut

en: then he assumed for her the likeness
And We gave understanding of it
the needy who do not ask
ms: orang yang rela dengan apa yang ada padanya

en: So let them not dispute with you
and the one who is sought
so Musa struck him with his fist
cried out to him for help
and the women who give charity
(as much as) the membrane of a date-seed
(would be) a responder to a cry
(is a spring of) water to bathe

ms: orang-orang yang mengikuti jalan yang lurus

en: for the wayfarers in the desert
and the women who give charity

ms: kelak akan Kami beri tanda dia

en: and would be conscious of it
They will be made to see each other
of the skin of the head
are gathered to their appointed time
And those who race each other
and provides a grave for him

ms: dengan cahaya merah di waktu senja

en: But will be removed from it
